EV Charger Installation

Upgrade your home with a fast, safe EV charging point installed by certified professionals.

Proudly serving all areas of Essex as well as London with every job.

Call for ServiceGet Free Quote

What's Included in our EV Charger Installation

Our team of NICEIC-approved electricians provide thorough, safe, and professional ev charger installation across Essex and London. We pride ourselves on transparent pricing and high-quality workmanship.

Smart Chargers
Tethered & Socketed
Load Management
Grant Support

Why Choose Us for this Service?

NICEIC Approved: Fully certified work that meets all current UK building regulations and safety standards.

Transparent Pricing: Clear, competitive quotes with no hidden fees or surprise costs.

Expert Knowledge: 10+ years of experience handling specific ev charger installation projects.

Need Emergency Help?

Available 24/7 for electrical emergencies. Rapid response across all Essex areas.

+447737447302

Average Response: Under 60 Mins
